verses.1: Behold, how good and how pleasant [it is] for brethren to dwell together in unity!
verses.2: [It is] like the precious ointment upon the head, that ran down upon the beard, [even] Aaron's beard: that went down to the skirts of his garments;
verses.3: As the dew of Hermon, [and as the dew] that descended upon the mountains of Zion: for there the LORD commanded the blessing, [even] life for evermore.
